headline: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Strike Central Israel Killing Ten
summary: Iran launched multiple waves of ballistic missiles at central Israel on March 1, 2026, in retaliation for the US-Israeli strikes that killed Supreme Leader Khamenei. Confirmed hits include a residential building in Tel Aviv killing one Philippine national and injuring 22+, and a synagogue/bomb shelter in nearby Beit Shemesh killing 9 and injuring 40+. Red Alert sirens activated across the entire central region from Netanya to Hebron, with Israel's multi-layered air defenses (Arrow, David's Sling, Iron Dome) engaging but failing to intercept all threats.

secondary_markets.name: Elbit Systems
secondary_markets.reason: Israel's largest public defense firm; wartime demand for EW, UAV, and munitions surging with price target revisions toward $1,200/share.

secondary_markets.name: RTX Corporation (Raytheon)
secondary_markets.reason: Raytheon-Rafael JV awarded $1.25B Tamir interceptor contract; Iron Dome resupply is critical and accelerating.

secondary_markets.name: El Al Israel Airlines
secondary_markets.reason: All flights cancelled through at least March 14; aircraft evacuated from Ben Gurion; thousands of passengers stranded with no revenue.

secondary_markets.name: ZIM Integrated Shipping
secondary_markets.reason: Operating Haifa and Ashdod ports under severe pressure; Maersk already halted Haifa calls citing safety risks; pending $4.2B Hapag-Lloyd merger at risk.

secondary_markets.name: Gold
secondary_markets.reason: Safe-haven flows pushed gold past $5,300/oz for first time in history; escalating Iran war drives further upside.

trade_position: Long RTX (Raytheon) calls: the confirmed penetration of Israel's air defenses by Iranian missiles guarantees emergency interceptor replenishment orders worth billions — Raytheon's Tamir co-production JV is the sole supplier and the $1.25B contract is just the first tranche. Short ELAL.TA as Ben Gurion remains closed indefinitely with no revenue visibility.

messages.text_en: 🚨 Initial warning: sirens expected soon across central Israel as the Islamic Republic of Iran launches yet another attack on Israeli civilians
